qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unauthenticated remote code execution via script execution endpoint in default configuration
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Does not identify the advisory root cause. This finding relies on FUXA's default secureEnabled=false behavior and direct unauthenticated access to /api/runscript, while the advisory root cause is heartbeat refresh token minting when authentication is enabled.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unauthenticated arbitrary file write via upload endpoint destination path traversal
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different vulnerable code and root cause. This finding concerns missing authentication and path traversal in POST /api/upload, not the heartbeat refresh endpoint, x-auth-user handling, or administrator JWT minting described by the advisory.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No final qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described heartbeat refresh authentication bypass. The advisory patch changes server/api/index.js and server/api/jwt-helper.js so guests or invalid-token requests with forged x-auth-user data cannot mint refreshed administrator JWTs when secureEnabled=true. The qualifying findings instead cover default-auth-disabled /api/runscript code execution and /api/upload path traversal.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-vwcg-c828-9822 describes unauthenticated administrator JWT minting via the heartbeat refresh API when runtime.settings.secureEnabled is true, followed by administrative API abuse for code execution.

Patch fe82348d160904d0013b9a3e267d50158f5c7afb replaces jwt-helper getNewToken(headers) with getNewTokenFromRequest(req) and prevents unauthenticated heartbeat requests from receiving tokenRefresh JWTs.
rce-unauth-runscript/vulnerability_report.json describes secureEnabled=false, verify-api-or-token passing requests through, and direct POST /api/runscript execution through Module._compile().
unauth-upload-path-traversal/vulnerability_report.json describes POST /api/upload missing secureFnc middleware and unsanitized destination path traversal to fs.writeFileSync.
blockers_to_higher_tier: No qualifying finding matched the advisory root cause, so PoC execution was not applicable under the required decision order.
